caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio against a backdrop of dark gray acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He speaks into a silver professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm; the arm features the white text "RØDECaster Pro". Throughout the sequence, the man is gesturing with his hands while talking. Initially, he reaches up toward his headphones with his right hand. As the scene progresses, he moves his right arm outward and upward, opening his hand to emphasize his speech. His facial expressions change as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his eyes shifting. A tattoo is partially visible on his right forearm. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up.
